name: SSL Certificate Checker
description: Check SSL/TLS certificate details including expiration date, issuer, validity, cipher suites, and security warnings for any domain. Supports STARTTLS protocols and batch checking.
review: Complete SSL/TLS inspection workflow with exceptional documentation. Handles edge cases like STARTTLS protocols, self-signed certificates, and hostname mismatches. Uses only standard system tools (openssl) with GPG signing via SkillSeal. First GPG-signed skill in the catalog. Documentation is exemplary — every openssl flag explained with rationale and cross-platform differences explicitly handled.
license_note: Non-commercial, personal, educational, and evaluation use permitted. Commercial use requires separate license from author (ian@esoup.net). Converts to Apache 2.0 on 2030-02-14.
